design_notes:
S0 (Intro): Starts with a stabilizing center BAR hold at beat 4 to introduce the basic mechanics, transitioning into comfortable 2-beat interval taps that alternate lanes.
S1 (Drop): The intensity ramps up slightly, establishing a steady alternating highway flow on the main beats. A GAP lane hold on beat 17 anchors the middle of the drop.
S2 (Outro): Maintains rhythmic momentum but stretches the patterns cleanly. A final NOTE lane hold at beat 32 gives a satisfying completion feel before the track fades out.

sections.name: S0
sections.intent: Introductory comfort with a central hold and basic alternating lane taps.

sections.name: S1
sections.intent: Drive rhythmic density slightly higher with steady lane transitions and a left-lane hold.

sections.name: S2
sections.intent: Gradual wind-down using a final right-lane hold and symmetric alternating taps to close out.
